title: Last Flamingo of the Red Summer Sunset
original_title: Last Flamingo of the Red Summer Sunset
overview: The frontier is closing, but the imagination of the west remains. Decades since the genocide of a local tribe, there is one final 'wild-man'. Benjamin wishes to rid the land of the indigenous peoples, tasking Henry with extermination.
